title: Odontoloma blumeanum
taxonomy: Odontoloma blumeanum is a species of beetle in the family Mordellidae. It is a type of tumbling bug, which belongs to the order Coleoptera. The classification of Odontoloma blumeanum is further broken down into the kingdom Animalia and the phylum Arthropoda. Within the phylum Arthropoda, it is classified as a subphylum Hexapoda, which includes insects. Further classification places it in the class Insecta, with a more specific classification of order Coleoptera and family Mordellidae.

The health benefits of Odontoloma blumeanum include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which can help in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress.
